desc: C* (C-Asterisk) is a custom, high-performance programming language. It uses LLVM and native I/O bypasses to run Deep Learning models from scratch 100x faster t…
descFull: C* (C-Asterisk) is a custom, high-performance programming language. It uses LLVM and native I/O bypasses to run Deep Learning models from scratch 100x faster than Python.
